doc: Default polyphonic playable rig (8 voices, ADR-0032). Send /voicer/notes [midi, gate] to play (e.g. [69.0, 1.0] note-on A4, [69.0, 0.0] note-off); send several to play a chord. Each voice is a hosted `default-voice` sub-patch.

nodes.doc: Hosts 8 default-voice sub-patches; allocates notes across them and sums their audio.
